thread.title: RUWAYDA REDFEARN: Business must lead the way and invest in South Africa’s economy
thread.title_full: RUWAYDA REDFEARN: Business must lead the way and invest in South Africa’s economy

author: Ruwayda Redfearn
title: RUWAYDA REDFEARN: Business must lead the way and invest in South Africa’s economy
text:
Opinion RUWAYDA REDFEARN: Business must lead the way and invest in South Africa’s economy This is an edited version of a speech delivered by Deloitte Africa CEO Ruwayda Redfearn at the Sunday Times Top 100 Companies Awards dinner B L Premium 24 November 2024 - 07:54 by Ruwayda Redfearn
Good evening, distinguished guests, honourable deputy finance minister, captains of industry, esteemed colleagues, and members of the media. It is a privilege for Deloitte to be associated with the Sunday Times Top 100 Companies.
Tonight, is not just about recognition of business excellence and outstanding achievements of companies and individuals — it’s about celebrating and acknowledging the journey that got you here. We recognise that behind every achievement is a story of grit, resilience, and often the courage to fail, but most importantly to keep going when things are tough...
